description: The animating force that gives life its vitality and purpose. Spirit encompasses the breath of life, the fire of consciousness, the connection to all that is sacred, the part of us that soars beyond physical limits.
rationale: The word 'whae' combines breath-like 'wha' with elevated 'e', creating vowel hiatus with fricative digraph. This breath-to-elevation structure captures spirit as life breath rising to transcendence.
